author: lOrm
content: Already addressed under crosslink #768 (see src/tool_intercept.rs:608-629 doc-comment). The earliest_match.is_none() || idx < earliest_match.unwrap() pattern has been replaced with Option::is_none_or, removing the .unwrap() entirely. Verified: rg unwrap src/tool_intercept.rs returns no matches inside try_extract_shorthand_format.
